receipt_body_policy: receipts report paths hashes counts anchor results and synthetic auth-failure-loop checks but never duplicate full source bodies, prompt bodies, hidden reasoning, provider request/response payload bodies, account/session material, browser/HUD live access, recipient-send state, generated state output, or credential-equivalent payloads
public_runtime_policy: public validation uses exact source digest, anchor checks, syntax compilation, and synthetic telemetry-quality classification checks; copied source module is body evidence, not authority to scan live ~/.claude or ~/.codex sessions, dispatch bridges, call providers, execute local CLIs, access browser/HUD state, emit prompt/provider/tool-output bodies, write generated state, mutate private state, or claim release authority.

modules.source_role: Macro telemetry-quality classifier that demotes auth-failure observer loops and stale source runtimes without deleting canonical agent observability events or exporting live payload bodies.
required_anchors: Pure telemetry-quality classification over the agent observability plane.
